full_text:
Lu Jun (Jicai)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Jun, styledJicai, was born in Wu. May have been assisted by Sun Jian. Noted for generosity to retainers and clients. Lu Jun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Lu Kang. Lu Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
